steps.title: See what the phrase explains
steps.content: The sentence says the local effort had grown into something far more extensive, then immediately explains what that something was: a network of committees. The punctuation must introduce that explanatory noun phrase.

steps.title: Use a colon for elaboration
steps.content: B uses a semicolon even though the following phrase is not an independent clause. C creates a comma splice with it was. D turns the following noun phrase into a fragment. A colon after extensive correctly introduces the explanation. The answer is A.
